visa_types.name: Tourism
visa_types.documents_required:
Document Checklist – Click here
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[svk > lao > en > Table:Tourism > Visa Fees 1]
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 45 Euros (Inclusive of VAT) payable in Cash/QR Code or by Debit/Credit Card.
Please Note:
- The child between 0 - 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are Biometric exempt.
- The applicable visa fee and service fee are as per the current rate of exchange set by the Embassy of Slovakia. They are subject to change without any notice
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.
visa_types.processing_time: From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it takes 15 to 45 calendar days to process the visa application. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted.
visa_types.forms:
Application Form EN
To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Overview - individuals travelling to Slovakia with the purpose of tourism can apply
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Overview - individuals travelling to Slovakia with the purpose of tourism can apply

## Visa Fees

[svk > lao > en > Table:Tourism > Visa Fees 1]
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 45 Euros (Inclusive of VAT) payable in Cash/QR Code or by Debit/Credit Card.
Please Note:
- The child between 0 - 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are Biometric exempt.
- The applicable visa fee and service fee are as per the current rate of exchange set by the Embassy of Slovakia. They are subject to change without any notice
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

## Documents Required
Document Checklist – Click here
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.

## Photo Specifications
Applicants need to submit their application form with the new photo format, as explained below:
The photo must fulfil the norm specified by the ICAO (International Civil Aviation Organization).
- Use plain light-coloured background.
- The photo must be no more than 6-months old.
- Not tilted picture (portrait style) showing both edges of face clearly.
- Close up of the head and top of the shoulders so that the face takes up 70–80% of the photograph.

## Processing Time
From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it takes 15 to 45 calendar days to process the visa application. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted.

## Download Forms
Application Form EN
To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.
